summary: Great‑sounding recording with a slightly slower half‑step tempo
review: Reviewers praise the audio quality, calling it a great‑sounding capture and thanking the archivists for their work. The only performance note is that the band plays at a half‑step slower pace than usual, but no specific songs or musical moments are highlighted.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review is available; it rates the recording highly but provides no detail on performance, so rating leans toward good sound quality with limited confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the audio as 'great sounding' and appreciates the work put into the release; no mention of source (soundboard, audience, etc.).
